zh.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton於1451年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯。她於1472年與Sir Thomas Coker在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年在英國多瑟特享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton于1451年出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯。她于1472年与Sir Thomas Coker在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年在英国多瑟特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton was born in 1451, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. She married Sir Thomas Coker in 1472, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1530, in Dorset, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton est née en 1451, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Coker en 1472, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton wurde 1451 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1472 in Lincolnshire, England Sir Thomas Coker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton è nata il nel 1451 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Coker nel 1472, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1530, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton(은)는 1451년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 링코실르에서 Sir Thomas Coker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 도르세트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton родилась в 1451 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Coker в 1472 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jane Sutton nació en 1451, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Thomas Coker en 1472, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1530, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
